name: PaddleOCR (Baidu)

auth.notes: Local inference; PaddleHub for model download

performance.notes: Lightweight models available; PP-OCRv4 achieves near state-of-the-art with fast inference

agent_readiness.notes: Baidu's OCR toolkit on PaddlePaddle. PP-OCRv4: text detection + recognition + angle correction. 80+ languages. Multiple model sizes (mobile to server). Table recognition. Layout analysis. KIE (Key Information Extraction). Document VQA. Particularly strong for Chinese text. Apache 2.0 license (commercial friendly). Requires PaddlePaddle framework. Simple Python API: ocr.ocr(img_path). Widely used in production document AI.

gotchas: Requires PaddlePaddle framework (large dependency, not PyTorch)
PaddlePaddle less well-known in Western ML community
Documentation primarily in Chinese (English docs available but sometimes incomplete)
best_when: Chinese text OCR (strongest quality for Chinese)
Document AI with table extraction and layout analysis
Production OCR needing lightweight model options
avoid_when: When Surya's newer architecture is preferred
summary: PaddleOCR is Baidu's production-grade OCR toolkit on PaddlePaddle. Apache 2.0 license. 80+ languages, multiple model sizes (mobile to server). Strong Chinese text OCR. Includes text detection, recognition, layout analysis, and table recognition. Widely used in production document AI. Requires PaddlePaddle (not PyTorch) — heavier setup but best-in-class for Chinese OCR.
